experiment_title: Copper Wire Reaction with Concentrated and Dilute Sulfuric Acid

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="Copper Wire Reaction with Concentrated and Dilute Sulfuric Acid" goal="To observe the chemical changes of copper wire when exposed to concentrated and dilute sulfuric acid, and detect any gas evolution using NaOH solution." difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="10ml" />
      <Component id="test_tube_2" type="test_tube" capacity="10ml" />
      <Component id="graduated_cylinder" type="graduated_cylinder" capacity="10ml" />
      <Component id="rubber_stopper_with_tube" type="rubber_stopper_with_tube" />
      <Component id="copper_wire" type="wire" />
      <Component id="glass_rod" type="glass_rod" />
      <Component id="tweezers" type="tweezers" />
      <Component id="beaker_naoh" type="beaker" capacity="50ml" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="conc_H2SO4" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="dil_H2SO4" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="NaOH_solution" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Insert tool="copper_wire" vessel="glass_rod" id="step_0" />
      <Insert tool="copper_wire" vessel="tweezers" id="step_1" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_2" />
      <Insert tool="copper_wire" vessel="rubber_stop_cu" id="step_3" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_4" />
      <Add vessel="graduated_cylinder" reagent="H2SO4" volume="2 mL" id="step_5" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="graduated_cylinder" to_vessel="test_tube_1" volume="2 mL" id="step_6" />
      <Add vessel="graduated_cylinder" reagent="H2SO4" volume="2 mL" id="step_7" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="graduated_cylinder" to_vessel="test_tube_2" volume="2 mL" id="step_8" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_naoh" reagent="NaOH" volume="20 mL" id="step_9" />
      <Insert tool="test_tube_1" support="rubber_stopper_with_tube" id="step_10" />
      <Insert tool="test_tube_2" support="rubber_stopper_with_tube" id="step_11" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_12" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 准备铜丝，使用玻璃棒和镊子处理铜丝，为后续实验做准备。
用量筒分别量取2 mL 浓硫酸和2 mL 稀硫酸，并分别转移到两个试管中。
向烧杯中加入20 mL 氢氧化钠溶液，作为后续气体检验用。
将装有酸的试管与带导管的橡皮塞组装，准备进行铜丝与酸的反应。
等待反应进行，观察铜丝与浓、稀硫酸的反应现象，并检测是否有气体产生。
